reviews.review_title: I hope it's just a start
reviews.review_description:
I love the idea of content like this in VR and BBC is a name I trust can do it well but there are some issues with this first attempt. It isn't stereoscopic which I'd trade for better image quality but even that's not really as good as it could be here. The interactive features don't really add to the experience either. It's also a rather short experience.

That said, I understand getting footage like this is difficult and the conditions can't have been ideal either. I very much appreciate the effort and the price was reasonable. Hoping to see more releases that improve on this in the future!
Just downloaded and it has been installing for 2 days.  Is there a fix?
I liked it but  there's not much to it. Fun for a couple of times but that's about it.
It's just not a sharp enough picture, very swimmy.
Some great footage but there is not much to it. It is not a 'game' as such with very limited choices that make virtually no difference to what you see.
I keep trying to install this app and after it downloads it says installation failed, tried 4 times on different days now

At first I thought the poor image quality was due to my Oculus Go but fortunately I got other apps like this one with much better (and very good)quality) : definitely should be updated with better resolution
It took my money too and cant download it

developer_response.body: Hi sparta82, sorry to hear you are having issues with downloading the app. We've asked Oculus to look into the problem and will get back to you as soon as possible with a solution. Sorry for any inconvenience.

reviews.review_description: I think this app was very well done.

reviews.review_title: Decent title bogged down by resolution
reviews.review_description: So my girlfriend loves bears so I decided to download this and while she’s not into vr she did enjoy the story and so did I. But the resolution on it lower than the go (probably made for gear vr) so it is a bit blurry.
took my money and wouldn't allow me to download.... it robbed me... don't buy! trust me

developer_response.body: Hi doorsnjbod, sorry to hear you are having issues with downloading the app. We've asked Oculus to look into the problem and will get back to you as soon as possible with a solution. Sorry for any inconvenience.

reviews.review_description:
It remind me that time I lost my myopic glasses in the woods.
There are also bears....blurry ones.

reviews.review_title: Very blurry and out of focus
reviews.review_description: The demo video looks crisp and clear but the actual video is blurry and out of focus.  Still pretty but too hard on the eyes.
This would’ve been a phenomenal video and refreshing if the resolution was crisp as the demo shown here please fix
